data.name: Vector

weaponImprint.name: Banshee's Whisper
weaponImprint.trait: Gains 1 random buff for 1 turn if the user has full HP at the start of the action.
weaponImprint.effect: Prior to an allied unit's attack, if the target has any Burn Debuffs, the damage dealt is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%; if Burn damage is dealt, increases by another 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. If the target has Overheat Combustion, damage dealt by targeted Support Attacks increases by 5%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to URNC units is increased by 2.5%. If the target has any Burn debuffs, this is further increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A regularly pessimistic Doll. However, as the leader of H.I.D.E 404's Team  B, Vector will absolutely push through and endure till the very last moment with her teammates in the face of adversity, no matter how depressing the outcomes of her calculations.

skills.name: Depressive Mentality
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: Perception Block
skills.description:
Immune to negative effects inflicted by Burn tiles.

Before dealing Burn damage, if the target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], applies [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] on the target for 2 turns.

At the start of the battle, increases the number of all of Support Attacks dealing Burn damage by 1.

At the start of the turn, if Confectance Index is at maximum, Vector consumes all points of Confectance Index to increase attack by 10% until the end of the round.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Immune to negative effects inflicted by Burn tiles.

Before dealing Burn damage, if the target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], applies [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] on the target for 2 turns.

At the start of the battle, increases the number of all of Support Attacks dealing Burn damage by 2.

At the start of the turn, if Confectance Index is at maximum, Vector consumes all points of Confectance Index to increase attack by 10% until the end of the round.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Immune to debuffs inflicted by Burn tiles.

Before dealing Burn damage, if the target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], applies [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] on the target for 2 turns.

At the start of the battle, increases the number of all of Support Attacks dealing Burn damage by 2.

At the start of the turn, if Confectance Index is at maximum, Vector consumes all points of Confectance Index to increase attack by 10% until the end of the round.

For each point of Confectance Index above the maximum, further increases the attack by 10%, up to 20%. This effect lasts until the end of the round.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] gains a new effect: Burn damage taken is increased by 30%, fixed damage area is increased to 3x3. the number of all Support Attacks dealing Burn damage is increased by 1.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] gains a new effects: At the end of the action, generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles within 1 tile; fixed damgae multiplier is increased by 10%. At the start of the turn, for each point of Confectance Index above the maximum, further increases the attack by 10%, up to 20%.

skills.name: Dead End Meltdown
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 120% of attack to it. If the target has any Burn type debuffs, also deals fixed damage equal to 50% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the target and applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns. Vector gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 150% of attack to it, also deals fixed damage equivalent to 80% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the target and applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] and [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] for 2 turns. Vector gains 4 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage Multiplier is increased by 30% and fixed damage multiplier is increased by 30%. Burn debuffs are no longer needed to deal fixed damage, and [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] is additionally applied for 2 turns. Vector gains 2 more points of Confectance Index.

skills.name: Portent of Doom
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles, applies [effect:dddd43cc-bb58-46d0-9834-27523191d57a] for 2 turns, and deals Burn damage equal to 100% of attack to them. Vector gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles, applies [effect:dddd43cc-bb58-46d0-9834-27523191d57a] for 2 turns, [effect:7d900a53-1edb-4532-9da4-c614b83cb560] for 1 turn, and deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack. Vector gains 4 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased by 30%. [effect:dddd43cc-bb58-46d0-9834-27523191d57a] gains a new effect: Each Burn debuff increases damage taken by 3%. Applies [effect:7d900a53-1edb-4532-9da4-c614b83cb560] for 1 turn. Vector gains 2 more points of convectance Index.

skills.name: Searing Finale
skills.description:
Selects a tile within 7 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equivalent to 60% of attack to all enemy units within 7 tiles of the target tile, and generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

Applies [effect:b6f2ac90-1fa5-4b80-a602-36094fc3abaf] to all allied units, lasting for 2 turns. Vector gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects a tile within 7 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equivalent to 60% of attack to all enemy units within 7 tiles of the target tile, and generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

Cleanses 2 debuffs and applies [effect:b6f2ac90-1fa5-4b80-a602-36094fc3abaf] and [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] to all allied units, lasting for 2 turns. Vector gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects a tile within 7 tiles, dealing AoE Burn damage equivalent to 60% of attack to all enemy units within 7 tiles of the target tile, and generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

Cleanses 2 debuffs and applies [effect:b6f2ac90-1fa5-4b80-a602-36094fc3abaf] and [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] to all allied units, lasting for 2 turns. Vector gains [effect:8980f1fb-0f05-4e75-a584-623f2067c9c7] for 2 turns and [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The effect of [effect:b6f2ac90-1fa5-4b80-a602-36094fc3abaf] changes: When dealing Burn damage, damage is increased by 20%. Applies [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] to all allied units for 2 turns. Cleanses 2 debuffs from all allied units.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:b6f2ac90-1fa5-4b80-a602-36094fc3abaf] gains new effects: When dealing Burn damage, critical damage is increased by 15% and every Burn buff increases damage dealt by 5%. Vector gains [effect:8980f1fb-0f05-4e75-a584-623f2067c9c7], lasting for 2 turns.

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, if any enemy unit has any Burn debuffs, attack is increased by 8%.

After making an active attack, the cooldown for the Ultimate skill Searing Finale is reduced by 1 turn. When ally units perform a support attack that deals Burn damage, gains 1 point of Confectance Index and heals all ally units on the battlefield for HP equal to 15% of attack. This effect can trigger up to 4 times per turn.
If Dead End Meltdown kills its main target, generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles within 3 tiles of the target for 2 turns.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
Before the attack, cleanses 2 buffs from the enemy target.
Before dealing damage to a large target with an active attack, additionally deals 1 instance of fixed damage equal to 15% of attack.
While on a Burn tile, damage taken is reduced by 20%. At the end of the action, Vector restores 2 points of stability index and 10% of max HP.

When an enemy unit within range is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], launches [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing Burn damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

vertebrae.effect: [effect:e64fa51b-656e-4ef8-83bd-c5f45c4950ad] gains a new effect: Burn damage taken is increased by 30%, fixed damage area is increased to 3x3. the number of all Support Attacks dealing Burn damage is increased by 1.

doll.name: Vector
doll.effects: A regularly pessimistic Doll. However, as the leader of H.I.D.E 404's Team  B, Vector will absolutely push through and endure till the very last moment with her teammates in the face of adversity, no matter how depressing the outcomes of her calculations.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Burn damage dealt by this unit, Burn damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.
